name: self_optimizer
description: Self-improving AI agent that analyzes, modifies, tests, and optimizes the AI HUB codebase or generates new experiments. Use when the user wants to optimize, improve, refactor, self-modify, or run autonomous improvement cycles on the codebase.

request.description: What to optimize or improve. Can be a specific task or 'auto' for AI-chosen improvements.

mode.description: Mode: 'task' for specific task, 'auto' for AI-decided improvements

iterations.description: Number of optimization iterations (0 = infinite until stopped)
